ciliary_role: By yeast two-hybrid screening,   flagellar proteins that could interact with TEKT2 , which resulted in the isolation of novel two genes from the mouse testis library, referred as a TEKT2-binding protein 1 (TEKT2BP1) and -protein 2 (TEKT2BP2) isolated.RT-PCR analysis indicated that TEKT2BP1, which is registered as a coiled-coil domain-containing protein 172 (Ccdc172), was predominantly expressed in rat testis and that its expression was increased after 3 weeks of postnatal development. Immunocytochemical studies discovered that TEKT2BP1 localized in the middle piece of rat spermatozoa, predominantly concentrated at the mitochondria sheath of the flagella(PMID: 24394471).

ai_summary.basic_summary: CCDC172 is a ciliary gene encoding coiled-coil domain containing 172 [source:hgnc symbol;acc:hgnc:30524]
